title: Sysmon Executable File Created or Detected
description: Detects Sysmon Event ID 29 FileExecutableDetected and Event ID 11 executable file creates in writable or startup locations.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ('Event ID' in ('29', '11')) and ('Target Filename' like '*.exe' or 'Target Filename' like '*.dll' or 'Target Filename' like '*.scr' or 'Target Filename' like '*.ps1') and ('Target Filename' like '*\\Temp\\*' or 'Target Filename' like '*\\Users\\Public\\*' or 'Target Filename' like '*\\ProgramData\\*' or 'Target Filename' like '*\\Startup\\*') | stats count as FileEvents, unique('Target Filename') as Files, unique('Process Name') as Writers by User, 'Host Name (Server)', Entity | sort -FileEvents
falsepositives: Installers, browser downloads, and software update packages
